features: Pipeline Status Tracking (1-tap on candidate cards)
🏆 Hired Team Tab — live auto-filter, gold/green theme
📋 Database Tab — full candidate list with real-time search
✍️ New Interview Tab — smart parse + manual form
Sal's Excel Export (.xlsx) — Numbers-compatible with range-based dropdowns
CSV Import/Export — bulk ingestion and backup

excel_export_logic.formula: Literal comma-separated string — NOT a range reference
excel_export_logic.reason: Numbers only reliably converts to Pop-Up Menu when validation is one range rule, not per-cell rules
excel_export_logic.layout: 6 columns: Name, Role, Shop, Phone, Status (yellow highlight), Notes

hired_tab_logic.method: Live filter of getDB() where status === 'Hired'
hired_tab_logic.sync: renderHired() called on every updateStatus() and tab switch
hired_tab_logic.data_integrity: Candidate remains in Database tab — no deletion or move
hired_tab_logic.toast: Special '🏆 Added to Hired Team!' toast on hire

mobile_optimizations.icons: Colored SVGs (Green Phone, Blue Email, Red Location)

parser_logic: Matches keywords: Service Advisor, A-Level Technician, Technician, Southfield, Waterford, Troy, Shelby Township, Utica.
maintenance_notes: v3.4.0: Hired Team tab, Numbers dropdown fix (range-based), real-time search bar, mobile-friendly Excel layout.
